params.config: The market config mapping storage reference.
params.id: The strategy vault to set the cap for.
params.msgSender: The msg.sender from the calling contract (for events).
params.pendingCap: The pending cap mapping storage reference.
params.withdrawQueue: The withdraw queue array storage reference.

returns.assetsToAdd: The amount of assets to add to lastTotalAssets (0 if market wasn't newly enabled).

params.asset: The underlying asset of the vault.
params.config: The market config mapping storage reference.
params.id: The strategy vault to set the cap for.
params.isStrategyAllowed: Whether the strategy is allowed by the factory.
params.newSupplyCap: The new supply cap to set.
params.pendingCap: The pending cap mapping storage reference.

returns.shouldSetCap: Whether the cap should be set immediately (vs pending).

setCap(mapping(IERC4626 => MarketConfig).notice: Sets the cap of a strategy vault.

submitCap(mapping(IERC4626 => MarketConf.notice: Validates and processes a submitCap request.
